files.patch:
@@ -2059,1 +2059,1 @@
-  checked_jni_IsValueObject(JNIEnv *env,
+  checked_jni_HasIdentity(JNIEnv *env,
@@ -2062,1 +2062,1 @@
-    jboolean result = UNCHECKED()->IsValueObject(env, obj);
+    jboolean result = UNCHECKED()->HasIdentity(env, obj);
@@ -2364,1 +2364,1 @@
-    checked_jni_IsValueObject
+    checked_jni_HasIdentity

@@ -806,0 +806,4 @@
+#define HOTSPOT_JNI_HASIDENTITY_ENTRY(arg0, arg1)
+#define HOTSPOT_JNI_HASIDENTITY_ENTRY_ENABLED()  0
+#define HOTSPOT_JNI_HASIDENTITY_RETURN(arg0)
+#define HOTSPOT_JNI_HASIDENTITY_RETURN_ENABLED()  0
@@ -818,4 +822,0 @@
-#define HOTSPOT_JNI_ISVALUEOBJECT_ENTRY(arg0, arg1)
-#define HOTSPOT_JNI_ISVALUEOBJECT_ENTRY_ENABLED()  0
-#define HOTSPOT_JNI_ISVALUEOBJECT_RETURN(arg0)
-#define HOTSPOT_JNI_ISVALUEOBJECT_RETURN_ENABLED()  0

@@ -76,1 +76,1 @@
-    jboolean     isValueObject; /* references to value objects are always strong */
+    jboolean     hasIdentity  ; /* references to non-identity objects are always strong */

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@

+
+#include <jni.h>
+
+JNIEXPORT jboolean JNICALL
+Java_runtime_valhalla_inlinetypes_TestJNIHasIdentity_hasIdentity(JNIEnv* env, jclass klass, jobject target) {
+  return (*env)->HasIdentity(env, target);
+}
